infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HomeHeros Go needs your location to navigate to job locations and provide accurate ETA to customers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HomeHeros Go needs your location to track your position during active jobs and provide accurate ETA to customers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: HomeHeros Go needs your location to track your position during active jobs and provide accurate ETA to customers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HomeHeros Go needs camera access to allow you to take before/after photos and verify your identity.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HomeHeros Go needs photo library access to allow you to upload photos for job documentation.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: HomeHeros Go needs your location to track your position during active jobs and provide accurate ETA to customers.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: HomeHeros Go needs your location to track your position during active jobs and provide accurate ETA to customers.
